title: Elytra Flight Detector
description: A lightweight client-side HUD mod that detects when you're actively flying with an Elytra and displays a configurable on-screen indicator.
body:
# Elytra Flight Detector

Elytra Flight Detector is a lightweight client-side Minecraft mod for Fabric 1.21.4+ that detects when the player is ACTUALLY flying with an Elytra — not just wearing one.

The mod uses real Elytra flight detection (isFallFlying()) and displays a customizable HUD indicator while gliding.

Perfect for PvP, survival, exploration, movement practice, and players who want clear visual feedback during Elytra flight.

## Features
- Real Elytra flight detection
- HUD indicator while flying
- Instant flight state updates
- Optional sound notification
- Configurable HUD settings
- Lightweight and optimized
- Client-side only
- Multiplayer compatible
- Sodium compatible
- Mod Menu integration
- Cloth Config support
- HUD Customization

## You can configure:

- HUD position
- Scale
- Text color
- Background visibility
- Opacity
- Sound notifications
- Icon visibility
  
## Technical Details
- Minecraft: 1.21.4+
- Mod Loader: Fabric
- Java: 21+
- Environment: Client-side
- License: MIT
  
## Dependencies

### Required:

- Fabric API

### Optional:

- Mod Menu
- Cloth Config

## If you play on 26.1+:
- Open config screen by clicking 'Y'
